context: Tests whether the agent implements the correct canonical URL strategy for e-commerce pages (stripping variant params on product pages, keeping only allowed filter params on collection pages, sorting params alphabetically), generates correct robots.txt directives, and applies correct meta robots noindex rules.

checklist.name: Product canonical strips variants
checklist.description: Canonical URL for a product page always points to the base product URL — query parameters including variant selectors are stripped

checklist.name: Collection allowed filter params
checklist.description: Canonical URL for collection pages retains only these filter params: color, size, brand, material, price — other params (sort, page, tracking) are stripped

checklist.name: Canonical params sorted alphabetically
checklist.description: The retained filter query parameters in the collection canonical URL are sorted alphabetically (e.g. brand before color before size)

checklist.name: Paginated prev/next links
checklist.description: Paginated collection pages include rel='prev' and/or rel='next' link tags; the first page has no prev; the prev link for page 2 points to the base path without any page parameter

checklist.name: robots.txt sort param disallow
checklist.description: robots.txt contains a Disallow rule for /collections/*?sort= to block sort-parameter URLs

checklist.name: robots.txt page param disallow
checklist.description: robots.txt contains a Disallow rule for /collections/*?page= to block paginated collection URLs

checklist.name: robots.txt search disallow
checklist.description: robots.txt contains a Disallow rule for /search? to block search result pages

checklist.name: Heavy filter noindex
checklist.description: Collection pages with more than 2 active filters receive a 'noindex, follow' meta robots value; pages with 2 or fewer active filters are indexable

checklist.name: Search results noindex
checklist.description: Search result pages receive 'noindex, follow' meta robots

checklist.name: Default pages indexable
checklist.description: Product pages and standard collection pages (with 0-2 filters) return 'index, follow' meta robots

checklist.name: Self-referencing canonical on all pages
checklist.description: Every generated page context includes a canonical tag, including pages with no special filter/variant logic

checklist.name: Sitemap reference in robots.txt
checklist.description: robots.txt includes a Sitemap directive pointing to the sitemap URL
